schedule.amount: As convenient, to reach the 3 litre minimum

daily_water_target.general_rule: Sip warm fluids throughout the day; avoid cold and carbonated drinks, as warm water stokes digestive fire, improves digestion, and helps prevent fat accumulation.

morning_drinks.name: Beetroot Juice
morning_drinks.frequency: Used in Week 2, 30 min before breakfast

morning_drinks.name: Turmeric Tea
morning_drinks.frequency: Used as an early morning drink in Week 8

morning_drinks.name: Ginger Water
morning_drinks.frequency: Mentioned in BASIC_HEALTHY_DIET guide as optional empty-stomach drink / constipation remedy

pre_meal_drinks.name: Chia Seeds Water
pre_meal_drinks.timing: 30 minutes before lunch (most weeks); 15-20 minutes before dinner in some weeks

pre_meal_drinks.name: Lemon Water or Buttermilk
pre_meal_drinks.timing: 20 minutes before dinner, used across most weeks

pre_meal_drinks.name: Buttermilk
pre_meal_drinks.timing: 20 minutes before dinner, alternative to lemon water

bedtime_drinks.name: Turmeric Milk
bedtime_drinks.timing: 1 hour before bed, used across most weeks

bedtime_drinks.name: Nutmeg Milk
bedtime_drinks.timing: 1 hour before bed, used in Week 11

bedtime_drinks.name: Turmeric Tea
bedtime_drinks.timing: 1 hour after dinner (post-dinner, not bedtime) in Weeks 4, 8, 9 - explicitly noted as 'don't skip this'

juices_and_smoothies_summary.context: Signature breakfast smoothie, repeated across nearly all weeks

general_beverage_restrictions: Tea and coffee only in the evening, with less sugar, limited to 100ml per day combined.
No tea or coffee on an empty stomach.
Avoid carbonated and cold drinks generally.
